info.title: MiniMax Overseas - Text to Video
info.description:
MiniMax Overseas text-to-video subdocument. This subdocument is the MiniMax Overseas view of the platform unified video API and describes only the subset of fields that are currently implemented and mapped to the official MiniMax text-to-video capability.

The platform entry path is `/v1/videos`, and the gateway ultimately calls upstream `POST https://api.minimax.io/v1/video_generation`. Public `seconds` maps to upstream `duration`, and public `size` maps to upstream `resolution`.

post.description:
This endpoint only applies to the MiniMax Overseas text-to-video capability.

Current support boundary:
- Supported models: `MiniMax-Hailuo-2.3`, `MiniMax-Hailuo-02`, `T2V-01-Director`, `T2V-01`
- Implemented fields: `model`, `prompt`, `seconds`, `size`
- Official optional fields `prompt_optimizer`, `fast_pretreatment`, `callback_url`, and `aigc_watermark` are passed through under `metadata.*` on the unified endpoint

value.prompt: A woman walks through a neon street in the rain.

200.description: Submission succeeded. Returns the unified OpenAI-style video task object.

400.description: Invalid request parameters, for example missing `prompt` or sending a model that does not support text to video.

seconds.description: Requested duration in seconds. The gateway maps it to upstream `duration`.

size.description: Requested resolution. The gateway maps it to upstream `resolution`. Common values include `768P` and `1080P`.

metadata.description: Pass-through area for official MiniMax extension fields. The baze platform supports `prompt_optimizer`, `fast_pretreatment`, `callback_url`, and `aigc_watermark`.
